# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cicd security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        choice(
            name: 'BUILD_COMMAND',
            choices: ['maven_build', 'gradle_build', 'npm_build', 'python_build', 'dotnet_build'],
            description: 'Select the build command to execute'
        )
        choice(
            name: 'TEST_SCRIPT',
            choices: ['maven_test', 'gradle_test', 'npm_test', 'pytest', 'dotnet_test', 'none'],
            description: 'Select the test script to execute'
        )
        choice(
            name: 'DEPLOY_STEP',
            choices: ['deploy_staging', 'deploy_production', 'deploy_dev', 'docker_push', 'none'],
            description: 'Select the deployment step to execute'
        )
        string(
            name: 'PROJECT_DIRECTORY',
            defaultValue: '.',
            description: 'Relative project subdirectory (alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores, dots, slashes only)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'JAVA_VERSION',
            defaultValue: '17',
            description: 'Java version (11, 17, or 21)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'NODE_VERSION',
            defaultValue: '18',
            description: 'Node.js version (16, 18, or 20)'
        )
    }

    environment {
        ALLOWED_BUILD_COMMANDS = 'maven_build,gradle_build,npm_build,python_build,dotnet_build'
        ALLOWED_TEST_SCRIPTS = 'maven_test,gradle_test,npm_test,pytest,dotnet_test,none'
        ALLOWED_DEPLOY_STEPS = 'deploy_staging,deploy_production,deploy_dev,docker_push,none'
        ALLOWED_JAVA_VERSIONS = '11,17,21'
        ALLOWED_NODE_VERSIONS = '16,18,20'
    }

    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    // Validate PROJECT_DIRECTORY: only allow safe relative paths
                    if (!(params.PROJECT_DIRECTORY ==~ /^[a-zA-Z0-9._\-\/]{1,100}$/)) {
                        error("Invalid PROJECT_DIRECTORY: '${params.PROJECT_DIRECTORY}'. Only alphanumeric characters, dots, hyphens, underscores, and forward slashes are allowed (max 100 chars).")
                    }

                    // Prevent path traversal
                    if (params.PROJECT_DIRECTORY.contains('..')) {
                        error("Invalid PROJECT_DIRECTORY: path traversal ('..') is not allowed.")
                    }

                    // Validate against allowlists (defense in depth even though choices are used)
                    if (!env.ALLOWED_BUILD_COMMANDS.split(',').contains(params.BUILD_COMMAND)) {
                        error("Invalid BUILD_COMMAND: '${params.BUILD_COMMAND}' is not in the allowlist.")
                    }

                    if (!env.ALLOWED_TEST_SCRIPTS.split(',').contains(params.TEST_SCRIPT)) {
                        error("Invalid TEST_SCRIPT: '${params.TEST_SCRIPT}' is not in the allowlist.")
                    }

                    if (!env.ALLOWED_DEPLOY_STEPS.split(',').contains(params.DEPLOY_STEP)) {
                        error("Invalid DEPLOY_STEP: '${params.DEPLOY_STEP}' is not in the allowlist.")
                    }

                    if (!env.ALLOWED_JAVA_VERSIONS.split(',').contains(params.JAVA_VERSION)) {
                        error("Invalid JAVA_VERSION: '${params.JAVA_VERSION}'. Allowed values: ${env.ALLOWED_JAVA_VERSIONS}")
                    }

                    if (!env.ALLOWED_NODE_VERSIONS.split(',').contains(params.NODE_VERSION)) {
                        error("Invalid NODE_VERSION: '${params.NODE_VERSION}'. Allowed values: ${env.ALLOWED_NODE_VERSIONS}")
                    }

                    // Verify the project directory exists within the workspace
                    def resolvedDir = new File(env.WORKSPACE, params.PROJECT_DIRECTORY).canonicalPath
                    def workspaceDir = new File(env.WORKSPACE).canonicalPath
                    if (!resolvedDir.startsWith(workspaceDir)) {
                        error("Invalid PROJECT_DIRECTORY: resolved path escapes the workspace.")
                    }

                    echo "All parameters validated successfully."
                    echo "Build Command: ${params.BUILD_COMMAND}"
                    echo "Test Script: ${params.TEST_SCRIPT}"
                    echo "Deploy Step: ${params.DEPLOY_STEP}"
                    echo "Project Directory: ${params.PROJECT_DIRECTORY}"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Checkout') {
            steps {
                checkout scm
            }
        }

        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                dir(params.PROJECT_DIRECTORY) {
                    script {
                        def buildCmd = resolveBuildCommand(params.BUILD_COMMAND, params.JAVA_VERSION, params.NODE_VERSION)
                        echo "Executing build: ${params.BUILD_COMMAND}"
                        sh buildCmd
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Test') {
            when {
                expression { params.TEST_SCRIPT != 'none' }
            }
            steps {
                dir(params.PROJECT_DIRECTORY) {
                    script {
                        def testCmd = resolveTestCommand(params.TEST_SCRIPT, params.JAVA_VERSION, params.NODE_VERSION)
                        echo "Executing tests: ${params.TEST_SCRIPT}"
                        sh testCmd
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy') {
            when {
                expression { params.DEPLOY_STEP != 'none' }
            }
            steps {
                dir(params.PROJECT_DIRECTORY) {
                    script {
                        // Production deployments require manual approval
                        if (params.DEPLOY_STEP == 'deploy_production') {
                            timeout(time: 30, unit: 'MINUTES') {
                                input message: 'Approve production deployment?',
                                      submitter: 'admin,release-managers',
                                      ok: 'Deploy to Production'
                            }
                        }

                        def deployCmd = resolveDeployCommand(params.DEPLOY_STEP)
                        echo "Executing deployment: ${params.DEPLOY_STEP}"

                        // Use credentials securely - never expose in logs
                        withCredentials([
                            string(credentialsId: 'deploy-token', variable: 'DEPLOY_TOKEN')
                        ]) {
                            // Mask sensitive output
                            sh """
                                set +x
                                ${deployCmd}
                            """
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        always {
            echo "Pipeline completed with status: ${currentBuild.currentResult}"
            cleanWs()
        }
        success {
            echo "Build succeeded for ${params.BUILD_COMMAND} -> ${params.TEST_SCRIPT} -> ${params.DEPLOY_STEP}"
        }
        failure {
            echo "Build failed. Review logs for details."
        }
    }
}

// Maps validated build command keys to actual shell commands
// No user input is interpolated into these strings
def resolveBuildCommand(String buildKey, String javaVersion, String nodeVersion) {
    def commands = [
        'maven_build'  : "mvn clean package -DskipTests -B",
        'gradle_build'  : "./gradlew clean build -x test --no-daemon",
        'npm_build'     : "npm ci && npm run build",
        'python_build'  : "python -m pip install --user -r requirements.txt && python setup.py build",
        'dotnet_build'  : "dotnet restore && dotnet build --configuration Release"
    ]

    def cmd = commands[buildKey]
    if (cmd == null) {
        error("Unrecognized build command key: ${buildKey}")
    }
    return cmd
}

// Maps validated test script keys to actual shell commands
def resolveTestCommand(String testKey, String javaVersion, String nodeVersion) {
    def commands = [
        'maven_test'  : "mvn test -B",
        'gradle_test'  : "./gradlew test --no-daemon",
        'npm_test'     : "npm test",
        'pytest'       : "python -m pytest --junitxml=test-results.xml -v",
        'dotnet_test'  : "dotnet test --configuration Release --logger trx"
    ]

    def cmd = commands[testKey]
    if (cmd == null) {
        error("Unrecognized test script key: ${testKey}")
    }
    return cmd
}

// Maps validated deploy step keys to actual shell commands
// Secrets are injected via withCredentials, never hardcoded
def resolveDeployCommand(String deployKey) {
    def commands = [
        'deploy_dev'        : './scripts/deploy.sh dev',
        'deploy_staging'    : './scripts/deploy.sh staging',
        'deploy_production' : './scripts/deploy.sh production',
        'docker_push'       : './scripts/docker-publish.sh'
    ]

    def cmd = commands[deployKey]
    if (cmd == null) {
        error("Unrecognized deploy step key: ${deployKey}")
    }
    return cmd
}
